schema_notes.fundamental: Dashboard-safe. Never contains price, analyst targets, or valuation. Advisor project reads this.
schema_notes.advisory: Advisor-layer only. Dashboard ignores this namespace. Advisor project overrides with real-time data.
schema_notes.tier_positions: Derived at build time from data.json company arrays. dominance auto-derived: 1 company=Monopoly, 2=Duopoly, 3+ with dominance keyword=Leader, 3+ otherwise=Contested. Rail-mapped tickers use layer_id=Rail-*.
schema_notes.score_history: Parsed from signals.md Research Log at build time. Empty array = not yet parsed.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Ambarella's CVflow SoCs deliver GPU-class AI inference at <20W, making it the default edge AI chip for robotics, ADAS, and computer vision at scale.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q1 FY2028 earnings — watch Hanwha ramp progress and edge AI revenue mix
CVflow 4.0 next-gen architecture timeline announcement
Additional ADAS OEM design-win announcements beyond Hanwha

advisory.bull_summary: CVflow architecture compounds at each generational step; Hanwha $800M+ deal provides multi-year revenue visibility; physical AI era (NVIDIA Isaac) expands edge inference TAM; 4 simultaneous adjacencies confirmed.
advisory.bear_summary: Mobileye OEM incumbency is deep with decades of automotive relationships; TSMC concentration creates geopolitical supply risk; CTO co-founder departure reduces active technical oversight at critical roadmap juncture.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Co-founder-led digital lidar company with a custom SoC architecture, Pentagon Blue UAS approval, and gross margins climbing from 22% to 45% — proof the cost curve is working.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — re-score trigger: watch GM recovery toward 50%+ post-StereoLabs integration
StereoLabs RGB-D + AI perception second product line commercial traction
NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion production vehicle program design wins from qualification

advisory.bull_summary: Digital SoC architecture (2 chips vs. dozens analog) compounds manufacturing cost advantage; Pentagon Blue certification opens defense TAM; NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion qualification embeds Ouster in AV production pipelines; StereoLabs adds multimodal perception platform.
advisory.bear_summary: Balance sheet thin (FH 2/5); StereoLabs integration causing GM step-down from 62% to 46% requires monitoring; co-founder leadership gaps; lidar commoditization risk from China vendors at lower ASPs.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Coherent is the broadest photonics platform in the AI transceiver supercycle — vertical integration from compound semiconductor wafers to 800G modules creates margin expansion runway if Jim Anderson can clean up the merger debt overhang.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q4 FY2026 earnings — watch gross margin trajectory toward 42%+ and debt paydown progress
1.6T transceiver qualification with hyperscalers — next revenue step-change
SiC substrate long-term supply contract with EV OEM — revenue visibility signal

advisory.bull_summary: Broadest photonics platform: 800G AI transceiver + VCSEL + SiC substrate; vertical integration from wafer to module; Jim Anderson (Lattice playbook) margin recovery mandate; margin recovery + debt paydown = multiple re-rating.
advisory.bear_summary: $4B+ net debt from II-VI/Finisar merger constrains financial flexibility; Asian transceiver ODMs pricing 800G aggressively; telecom weakness partially offsets AI datacom upside.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Lumentum holds the most defensible positions in photonics — Apple VCSEL monopoly + telecom ROADM duopoly + coherent transceiver — but the Apple concentration risk and telecom capex cyclicality keep this permanently undervalued relative to its technology quality.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q4 FY2026 earnings — watch 800ZR coherent ramp contribution and ROADM order recovery
Apple sole-source VCSEL confirmation for iPhone 18 cycle — structural anchor signal
800ZR hyperscaler design wins from NeoPhotonics InP capability

advisory.bull_summary: Highest gross margins in photonics (48%+); Apple VCSEL = multi-year sole-source with qualification lock-in; NeoPhotonics InP opens 800ZR data center TAM; ROADM carrier recovery adds upside.
advisory.bear_summary: Apple concentration (~30% revenue) creates permanent stock discount; Hurlston new CEO transition uncertainty; telecom capex cycles make ROADM unpredictable; Apple long-term silicon photonics in-sourcing risk.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Fabrinet is the TSMC of optical components — the world's only scaled precision photonic assembly platform, directly in the path of the AI transceiver supercycle with 15% operating margins that defy contract manufacturing norms.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q4 FY2026 earnings — AI transceiver volume sustaining +30% YoY; margin stability at 15%
1.6T CPO (co-packaged optics) assembly qualification — TAM doubling catalyst
Silicon photonics startup (Ayar Labs, Lightmatter) assembly win — new customer diversification

advisory.bull_summary: Only scaled precision optical assembly platform globally; NVIDIA-certified for AI transceiver volumes; 15% op margin defies contract mfg norms (process knowledge moat); net cash balance sheet; AI transceiver volumes scale with every NVIDIA rack-scale order.
advisory.bear_summary: Thailand geographic concentration — single natural disaster risk; Coherent (~largest customer) insourcing risk; top 3 customers ~50% revenue creates concentration sensitivity to any major OEM decision.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Ciena's WaveLogic coherent ASIC is the backbone of the internet's capacity expansion — as hyperscalers extend coherent optics inside their own data centers, Ciena transitions from a telecom cycle stock to a structural AI infrastructure compounder.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q3 FY2026 earnings — watch web-scale customer mix growing toward 40%+ of revenue
800ZR hyperscaler data center interconnect design wins — new TAM opening
WaveLogic 6 volume ramp — next coherent ASIC cycle driving equipment refresh

advisory.bull_summary: WaveLogic in-house ASIC achieves best-in-class spectral efficiency — operators extract more capacity from existing fiber; cloud operator (Google/Microsoft/AWS) mix shift improves revenue quality and visibility; 800ZR opens new data center TAM; Gary Smith 24-year CEO navigates cycles expertly.
advisory.bear_summary: ~60% carrier revenue creates telecom capex cycle exposure; Nokia competition in DWDM limits pricing power; macro-driven capex freeze would hit carriers first and hardest; management transition risk if Smith steps down.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: AAOI is a vertically integrated optical transceiver manufacturer riding AI data center demand recovery — the 2017 Amazon crash showed customer concentration kills; the question is whether diversification is real this cycle.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — GAAP profitability milestone + customer diversification evidence = re-rating catalyst
800G transceiver qualification at 2+ hyperscaler accounts — growth rate accelerator

advisory.bull_summary: Vertically integrated III-V epitaxial supply chain (InGaAsP grown in-house) = cost advantage when volumes scale; AI transceiver demand is real structural tailwind; GAAP profitability inflection could trigger 3-5x re-rating from small base.
advisory.bear_summary: 2017 Amazon crash (-90%) is structural cautionary history — customer concentration can recur; competing against Coherent, Lumentum, InnoLight on price not technology; CATV legacy drag on margins; limited competitive moat vs. Asian ODMs.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Dual-division micro-cap at the AI data center CPO laser bottleneck and mmWave 5G/defense — early revenue, 64% growing opportunity pipeline, and a critical cash runway constraint that makes execution timing everything.

near_term_catalysts.description: O-Net / Enablence CPO ELS modules — commercial production timeline from March 2026 partnership
Jabil manufacturing ramp — first volume production orders
InP photonics design-win with hyperscaler or Tier-1 transceiver customer
Strategic LiDAR customer high-volume production ramp

advisory.bull_summary: InP laser arrays sit at the CPO bottleneck tier; O-Net/Enablence commercial partnership validates technology; Jabil manufacturing partnership enables hyperscale production; $453M pipeline 64% growing.
advisory.bear_summary: Sub-12-month cash runway with ongoing dilution risk; 31x P/S valuation punishes execution misses; criminal investigation and delayed annual report governance flags; Achilles Capital parent in restructuring creating forced-sale overhang.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Intel's EMIB packaging and 25-year in-house silicon photonics stack is the only IDM-foundry platform that can solve the AI interconnect bottleneck while manufacturing on US soil.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 FY2026 earnings (unconfirmed) — guided $13.8-14.8B rev, $0.20 non-GAAP EPS
Apple preliminary deal converting to firm commitment for Intel US fabs
IFS first major HVM customer commitment beyond Apple (H2 2026-2027)
EMIB-T external customer design win announcement
CHIPS Act grant disbursement milestones

advisory.bull_summary: IFS as US-domiciled TSMC alternative with $15B+ signed lifetime commitments and CHIPS Act backing; EMIB+CPO platform uniquely combines design+foundry+packaging+photonics; Apple preliminary deal as anchor IFS customer.
advisory.bear_summary: Prior CEO Pat Gelsinger missed multiple process node roadmaps; IFS lacks proven HVM customers at scale; Broadcom already shipping CPO in production volume (50K+ units) ahead of Intel; FCF negative through 2026 with $6.5B bridge loan.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The dominant AI compute platform company; GPU monopoly in model training and inference with a rapidly expanding software moat (CUDA ecosystem) that makes switching nearly impossible.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 FY2027 earnings — primary metric: datacenter revenue growth rate
Blackwell / GB200 NVL72 rack demand updates and Rubin platform ramp
Export control policy changes affecting China and Middle East revenue
Hyperscaler capex guidance from MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META

advisory.bull_summary: CUDA ecosystem lock-in compounds with every AI software release; Blackwell/Rubin demand cycle extends AI capex supercycle into 2028+; software platform (NIM, DGX Cloud) compounds margins; physical AI/robotics opens new TAM layer.
advisory.bear_summary: Export controls on China revenue create recurring ceiling; custom silicon from hyperscalers (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia) threaten long-term share; AMD MI-series gaining inference share at major accounts.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Only US-listed pure-play HBM maker ramping NVIDIA's Vera Rubin supply; structural margin expansion as HBM penetration grows.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q3 FY2025 earnings — guidance on HBM4 ramp and capacity utilization key watch items
NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform ramp H2 2026 — Micron production constrained, pricing power inflection
Next-gen HBM5 design win announcements targeting 2027

advisory.bull_summary: Only US national security-cleared HBM maker; NVIDIA first-mover supply contract; HBM content per GPU rising as context windows expand; hyperscalers diversifying away from sole SK Hynix sourcing.
advisory.bear_summary: Low insider ownership; legacy DRAM/NAND exposure caps multiple re-rating; GPU demand cycle sensitive; potential supply diversification if Korean geopolitical tensions ease.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: $2B NVIDIA partnership on CXL switching + SSD controllers; infrastructure layer for AI memory disaggregation; broad exposure to AI infrastructure.

near_term_catalysts.description: Structera S 30260 CXL switch sample release Q3 2026
First hyperscaler Structera CXL switch design wins H2 2026
Q2 FY2027 earnings — watch AI infrastructure revenue mix vs legacy datacenter

advisory.bull_summary: $2B NVIDIA strategic investment de-risks Structera CXL ecosystem; CXL switching + SSD controllers + NVLink Fusion = multiple converging AI infrastructure tailwinds; 62% gross margin expanding on AI mix.
advisory.bear_summary: Distributed revenue across segments reduces pure-play leverage; Astera Labs has first-mover advantage in memory controllers; CXL ecosystem adoption could delay if hyperscalers prefer proprietary solutions.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The only wafer-level SiC burn-in solution at commercial scale — monopoly position in EV semiconductor test; watching for AI chip and photonics test expansion.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q3 FY2026 earnings — bookings and backlog are the primary thesis validators; first signs of EV ramp acceleration
New customer wins in AI chips or photonics test — TAM expansion signal

advisory.bull_summary: WaferPak is the only production-grade wafer-level SiC burn-in solution; monopoly position creates monopoly-level pricing power when SiC demand recovers; EV ramp is delayed, not cancelled; AI chip burn-in optionality.
advisory.bear_summary: EV production cycle reset is creating near-term revenue headwind; customer concentration in small Tier 1 supplier group; founder director selling shares (April 2026); limited diversification beyond SiC creates single-cycle risk.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Only pure-play CXL memory expansion provider; first hyperscale deployment (Azure) de-risks ecosystem; Nasdaq-100 added May 2026.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch Leo CXL revenue run-rate continuation vs. Q1 $308M annualized
Scorpio CXL switch platform ramp H2 2026 — key new revenue vector
Second hyperscaler CXL production deployment beyond Azure announcement

advisory.bull_summary: Only publicly traded pure-play CXL memory expansion company; Azure production deployment de-risks ecosystem chicken-and-egg; Nasdaq-100 inclusion signals institutional recognition; Scorpio switch extends TAM.
advisory.bear_summary: Pre-profitability at FH:2 (operating margin -45%); 51x P/S leaves no room for execution misses; Marvell Structera competing in adjacent CXL switching; CXL adoption timeline could slip.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Full-stack SerDes IP owner that has become the de facto AEC standard inside AI GPU clusters — FY2026 revenue tripled to $1.34B at 68% gross margins, now expanding to optical via Hyperlume.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q1 FY2027 earnings — watch quarterly gross margin sustaining ~67-68%
1.6T AEC product launch and first hyperscaler volume orders (H2 2026)
Hyperlume microLED integration: first product announcement or design win (H1 FY2027)
PCIe retimer revenue ramp — watch % of total revenue

advisory.bull_summary: 1.6T AEC transition triggers full cluster replacement cycle in H2 2026; PCIe retimer TAM over $1B by 2027; Hyperlume opens optical adjacency at 3.2T+; fifth hyperscaler in qualification reducing concentration.
advisory.bear_summary: ~88% revenue from top 3 hyperscalers creates capex-timing concentration risk; Astera Labs competing in retimers; Broadcom and Marvell can bundle competing solutions with switch silicon at scale.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Fabless NAND flash controller pure-play; MonTitan AI SSD ramping five hyperscalers; PCIe Gen5 ASP uplift, +100% growth.

near_term_catalysts.description: MonTitan mass production at 5 cloud customers H2 2026 — volume ramp visible in Q3 earnings
Q2 2026 earnings — guidance $393-411M, validate +100% growth continuation
Next-gen PCIe 6.0 controller sampling 2027

advisory.bull_summary: MonTitan is industry-first AI-optimized SSD controller with 5 simultaneous hyperscaler ramps; founder-led (Wallace Kou 2.5% ownership); fabless leverage drives margin expansion at scale; PCIe Gen5 ASP uplift structural.
advisory.bear_summary: NAND maker in-house controller development (Samsung, SK Hynix) threatens long-term share; NAND commodity cycle risk; customer concentration in hyperscalers; competing Phison designs in same market.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Pure-play memory interface IP (DDR5, HBM4E); 40% RCD market share; zero fab capex, 84% margins, $14B TAM by 2035.

near_term_catalysts.description: DDR5 MRDIMM (next-gen high-density) ramp H2 2026 — RCD royalties accelerate
HBM4E controller licensing deals at major DRAM customers 2027
CXL memory pooling controller ramp 2028+ — new TAM opening

advisory.bull_summary: Pure IP tollbooth: every DDR5 RDIMM server requires a Rambus RCD; 40%+ market share with network effects; 84% gross margin; zero fab capex = FCF machine; HBM4E controller IP licensed industry-wide at all major DRAM makers.
advisory.bear_summary: Customer concentration (Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron); competitor next-gen controller threat; memory cycle downturn reduces DDR5 RCD volume; small scale ($8B market cap) limits institutional float.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: World's #2 OSAT with 83% advanced packaging revenue, Kim family 49.4% founder control, and the only US-based CHIPS Act facility for AI chip packaging — the TSMC CoWoS overflow play.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — is +27% YoY a new baseline? Watch advanced packaging mix target (>85%)
Peoria AZ CHIPS Act facility construction milestone and first customer design-win
NVDA/hyperscaler AI chip packaging outsourcing decisions (CoWoS vs. AMKR capacity)

advisory.bull_summary: Q1 2026 record $1.68B (+27% YoY) suggests AI advanced packaging cycle accelerating; Kim family 49.4% control = 5-decade founder alignment; TSMC CoWoS constrained = structural overflow to AMKR; Peoria AZ facility is first US-based advanced packaging at scale.
advisory.bear_summary: Semiconductor cyclicality flows directly through OSAT business; Apple ~20%+ concentration; $2.5-3.0B capex creates elevated depreciation drag; new CEO (Jan 2026) transition risk; ASE Group larger and more diversified.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Wafer probe market leader extending into silicon photonics — the V93000-Triton partnership with Advantest is the only production-grade CPO test cell, making FORM the hardware gate through which every CPO wafer must pass.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch CPO test revenue recognition; probe card ASP trajectory
TSMC COUPE CPO production ramp 2026 — first production-scale V93000-Triton deployments
Keystone Photonics IP integration: next-gen optical probe announcement

advisory.bull_summary: V93000-Triton is the only production-grade CPO opto-electrical test cell — positioned at the chokepoint of the TSMC COUPE production ramp; CEO active insider buyer at elevated prices; 100+ SiPh customer deployments; Keystone acquisition consolidates IP.
advisory.bear_summary: Market cap re-rated 3x in 18 months on CPO timeline — execution must confirm; probe card business remains semiconductor capex-correlated; CPO revenue is early-stage; Advantest partnership risk; CFO identity not publicly confirmed.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Navitas pioneered the GaNFast integrated power IC that delivers 3x silicon's efficiency — a small-cap pure-play on the GaN transition in EV charging, data center PSUs, and industrial power, with execution risk and scale risk still to be proven.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — data center GaN PSU design win revenue recognition; key thesis validator
SiC Tier 1 auto OEM qualification (GeneSiC): EV inverter production ramp announcement
GaNFast 3rd generation: higher voltage for 48V data center power delivery buses

advisory.bull_summary: GaNFast monolithic integration reduces BOM cost vs. discrete GaN; deployed at Samsung/Dell/Lenovo scale; data center PSU design wins ramping; SiC GeneSiC Tier 1 auto qualification pipeline; GaN transition is inevitable.
advisory.bear_summary: -85% operating margin at $82M revenue; Infineon, STMicro, ON Semi, Wolfspeed all larger and better-capitalized; EV charging demand moderation creating near-term headwind; survival depends on outgrowing incumbent commoditization.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Infineon is the world's #1 automotive semiconductor and #1 SiC power manufacturer — the picks-and-shovels play on electrification, AI data center power, and grid decarbonization, at a European industrial valuation discount.

near_term_catalysts.description: Auto inventory normalization H2 2026: EV SiC volume recovery — near-term re-rating catalyst
200mm SiC yield improvement at Villach — gross margin expansion signal
AI server PSU design wins: OptiMOS/CoolGaN ramp in data center applications

advisory.bull_summary: #1 SiC by revenue + 200mm manufacturing leadership (year ahead of competitors); broadest power semi portfolio across auto/data center/industrial/security; €16.4B revenue GAAP profitable; European valuation discount creates entry opportunity.
advisory.bear_summary: Hanebeck professional manager 0.1% ownership (low alignment); 2025 auto inventory correction compressing near-term earnings; Chinese SiC vendors threatening lower-end pricing; European governance conservatism slows strategic pivots.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Co-founder-led AI data center operator with NVIDIA ($3.4B) and Microsoft ($9.7B) anchor contracts, 3GW permitted power pipeline, and a dynamic Bitcoin→GPU reallocation moat.

near_term_catalysts.description: End-2026 targets: 460 MW utilization, 140K GPUs, $3.4B ARR
Q4 FY2026 earnings — AI Cloud revenue vs. +94% QoQ baseline; path to EBITDA
Sweetwater Campus (2GW) NVIDIA DSX deployment milestones

advisory.bull_summary: 3GW permitted power pipeline unmatched among non-hyperscaler HPC operators; NVIDIA $3.4B + Microsoft $9.7B at 85% EBITDA margin de-risk buildout; co-founders 13.2% combined ownership; dynamic Bitcoin→GPU arbitrage is structurally unique.
advisory.bear_summary: Share dilution +124% YoY to 272M shares; $963M LTD + $3B convertible notes; net loss $(247.8)M in Q3; 20x ARR expansion target in 12 months is execution-dependent; hyperscaler capex cycle sensitive.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The dominant Ethernet switching platform for hyperscaler AI clusters; EOS software lock-in means every Meta/Microsoft/Google AI build is a recurring Arista order.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch AI/cloud revenue mix vs. enterprise; 800G adoption rate
800G adoption acceleration at hyperscalers H2 2026; ASP uplift visible in revenue
1.6T switching product cycle begins 2027; new TAM expansion

advisory.bull_summary: EOS ecosystem lock-in compounds with every AI cluster built; Meta/Microsoft/Google all accelerating AI capex; 400G→800G→1.6T product cycles extend value capture for 5+ years; $1B+ quarterly net income demonstrates exceptional financial leverage.
advisory.bear_summary: InfiniBand resurgence (NVDA Quantum-X) would slow Ethernet adoption; Meta ~15% concentration creates revenue timing risk; Cisco building AI-native networking products; hyperscalers developing custom switch silicon.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The chip-agnostic picks-and-shovels play on AI data center thermal management — $15B+ backlog, chip-agnostic wins regardless of GPU vendor, and every GPU cluster needs Vertiv.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch orders/backlog growth vs. Q4's 152% level; liquid cooling attach rate
Blackwell NVL72 rack ramp H2 2026 — liquid cooling demand surge trigger
Backlog-to-revenue conversion rate vs. Schneider/Eaton (key execution metric)

advisory.bull_summary: Chip-agnostic = wins regardless of who wins the AI chip race; $15B+ backlog (100%+ YoY) provides exceptional revenue visibility; Q4 orders +152% YoY; $1.9B FCF at 115% conversion; every GPU cluster is a mandatory Vertiv order.
advisory.bear_summary: Low insider ownership limits alignment signal; new CFO (Nov 2025) too early to evaluate; Schneider Electric and Eaton compete in every deal; SPAC debt structure; backlog conversion execution risk at $10B+ scale.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: NVIDIA's primary GPU rack ODM with founder 14-15% ownership and liquid-cooling first-mover advantage — discounted by unresolved governance overhang.

near_term_catalysts.description: DOJ investigation resolution — primary multiple re-rating catalyst; resolution = governance overhang lifts
Q4 FY2026 earnings — AI server revenue ramp; watch gross margin trajectory
CFO succession announcement — resolves key governance flag from 2024

advisory.bull_summary: NVIDIA preferred rack-scale ODM; fastest time-to-market on new GPU architectures; founder Liang 14-15% ownership; AI server TAM $30B→$300B+; liquid cooling design leadership; governance discount = potential upside on resolution.
advisory.bear_summary: DOJ investigation ongoing; CFO in succession limbo since 2024; 12% GM limits downside protection; ODM commoditization risk from Dell/HPE; SMCI governance scar tissue suppresses institutional ownership.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Everpure is the all-flash storage platform that AI training data gravity makes mandatory — Evergreen subscription lock-in, DirectFlash IP, and Portworx Kubernetes storage combine to create a durable enterprise storage franchise.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 FY2027 earnings (~Sep 2026) — ARR trajectory toward $2.5B; Portworx growth rate confirmation
New NVIDIA AI reference architecture certifications including Everpure storage
Evergreen//One flexible consumption expansion — converts CapEx buyers to subscription

advisory.bull_summary: Evergreen subscription 90%+ renewal rates + DirectFlash IP + Portworx AI pipeline = durable enterprise storage platform; DGX BasePod certification embeds storage in NVIDIA reference architecture; AI training data gravity compounds as model sizes grow.
advisory.bear_summary: Hyperscalers build all own storage (limits TAM); NetApp and Dell EMC serious competitors; rebranding from Pure Storage to Everpure creates short-term awareness cost; subscription deferred revenue recognition complexity.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: NVIDIA Exemplar Cloud-certified GPU neocloud (fewer than 10 globally) with 85%+ gross margins, $1.45B take-or-pay contracted backlog, and Dell DFS financing that removes dilutive equity risk.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — first fully public quarter; watch $375M ARR ramp progress
Thinking Machines Lab deployment completion — 5,000 NVIDIA B300 GPUs
SPAC lock-up expiry — 43.9M shares unlock (~250% of float); watch insider selling pace
5 new data center locations (in development) — go-live announcements

advisory.bull_summary: NVIDIA Exemplar Cloud certification places BRUN in peer tier with CRWV/Azure/OCI; $1.45B take-or-pay backlog growing 12x in 6 months; Dell DFS $1.44B financing eliminates dilution risk; compliance certifications gate regulated-industry procurement.
advisory.bear_summary: Thinking Machines Lab ~33% of backlog creates concentration risk; Nov 8 lock-up expiry ~43.9M shares is major float supply event; SPAC governance immaturity signals; CoreWeave and hyperscaler competition compressing neocloud pricing.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Rubrik is the cloud-native data security platform that ransomware makes mandatory — 46% ARR growth and 120% NRR at $1.46B ARR with founder-CEO Bipul Sinha holding 8.9%.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q1 FY2027 earnings — ARR trajectory toward $2B; operating leverage inflection watch
DSPM expansion: Data Security Posture Management product announcements
Government FedRAMP authorization expansion post-CIA CISO hire

advisory.bull_summary: Zero-trust architecture is the mandatory defense against ransomware; last-resort recovery position = highest switching cost; 120% NRR and 46% ARR growth validate enterprise lock-in; former CIA CISO + ex-Palo Alto CEO governance team.
advisory.bear_summary: -35% operating margin requires sustained growth to justify $18B market cap; CrowdStrike, Palo Alto competing in adjacent data security; founder Bipul Sinha running 10b5-1 sales plan.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: SailPoint is the identity governance control plane that every AI agent, bot, and human employee must pass through — machine identities growing 45:1 vs. humans makes this the fastest-expanding TAM in enterprise security.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 FY2026 earnings (~Aug 2026) — NRR + $1M+ customer cohort expansion; key health check
Machine identity product (FY2026/27): dedicated AI agent governance modules → NRR expansion
FY2027 profitability path: operating leverage → re-rating from growth to compounder

advisory.bull_summary: 150+ enterprise connectors = years of integration moat; Fortune 500 identity graph compounds as AI training data; machine identity 45:1 vs. humans is structural TAM expansion; 120% NRR and 185 customers >$1M ARR (+48%) prove land-and-expand.
advisory.bear_summary: Mark McClain only 2.5% ownership creates alignment gap vs. peers; Thoma Bravo overhang as PE exits; Microsoft (Entra), Okta, CyberArk competing in adjacent identity spaces; -15% operating margin.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: MercadoLibre is the Amazon + PayPal of Latin America — 27 consecutive quarters of 30%+ growth with GAAP profitability across a region of 650M people with massive e-commerce and fintech under-penetration.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — whether +49% YoY acceleration in Q1 sustains; margin trajectory in investment phase
Mexico acceleration: third-largest LatAm economy is MELI's fastest-growing market
Mercado Crédito: credit book expansion — total loans outstanding vs. NPL ratio

advisory.bull_summary: 27 consecutive 30%+ growth quarters + GAAP profitable + four-flywheel compounding; Galperin 7% stake + 26-yr track record + internal CEO succession; LatAm e-commerce at 10% penetration with decades of runway; flywheel reinforces in every market.
advisory.bear_summary: LatAm FX volatility (Brazilian Real, Argentine Peso) creates reported USD revenue noise; deliberate investment phase compressing near-term margins; Nubank/PagSeguro competition in Brazil payments; 55x Fwd P/E punishes macro surprises.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Robinhood is the retail fintech platform with a real recurring revenue stream (Gold, >3M subscribers) and Bitstamp crypto optionality, but PFOF regulatory risk and crypto cyclicality keep it a tactical trade more than a compounder.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — whether Q1 +50% was sustainable or peak-cycle; Gold subscriber count
PFOF regulatory decision: SEC rule finalization — binary event (upside if grandfather; downside if ban)
Bitstamp integration progress — international crypto exchange revenue contribution

advisory.bull_summary: Gold subscribers >3M growing 25% YoY = $360M+ ARR of defensible recurring revenue; Tenev co-founder 8% + super-voting = strong alignment; Bitstamp global crypto exchange adds regulatory-compliant international optionality; GAAP profitable FY2025.
advisory.bear_summary: PFOF (30-50% of non-Gold revenue) faces SEC ban risk — material impairment scenario; crypto revenue highly cyclical (crypto winter = revenue crater); commission-free trading now table stakes; super-voting limits shareholder influence.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Digital-native U.S. bank with a national charter; Galileo B2B platform and Financial Services Productivity Loop flywheel driving nine consecutive GAAP-profitable quarters and 30% member growth.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — 10th consecutive GAAP-profitable quarter; watch LPB revenue trajectory and deposit growth
SoFi USD stablecoin launch — loan tokenization and POS crypto payments timeline
Galileo revenue ramp — $1.2B targeted for 2026

advisory.bull_summary: 10 consecutive GAAP-profitable quarters; Financial Services Productivity Loop (75% 30-day second-product adoption) compounds cross-sell; LPB capital-light fee income scales without credit risk; CEO Noto 39 open-market buys and 0 sales over 5 years.
advisory.bear_summary: ~33x 2026E P/E punishes any miss; unsecured personal loan book vulnerable in macro downturn; LPB growth rate-cycle sensitive; competitive pressure from incumbent banks building digital-first products.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Oklo is the nuclear renaissance pure-play at the intersection of AI's insatiable power demand and bipartisan nuclear policy support — pre-revenue with exceptional management and 20+ GW of power purchase LOIs, but entirely dependent on NRC licensing execution.

near_term_catalysts.description: NRC combined license application: approval or extension — binary re-rating event
Idaho National Laboratory DOE pilot plant milestone — first Aurora heat generation
First commercial PPA: converting an LOI to a binding 20-year power purchase agreement

advisory.bull_summary: AI data center power demand is the most credible demand driver in SMR history; Sam Altman 12% + board + DeWitte/Cochran founders = exceptional alignment; 20+ GW LOI pipeline; fuel cycle closing eliminates nuclear waste problem; ADVANCE Act bipartisan support.
advisory.bear_summary: No deployed reactor; initial NRC application rejected 2022 for insufficient safety documentation; regulatory path for novel reactor design 5-10 years historically; burning SPAC proceeds with no commercial revenue; $4B market cap is pure optionality on unproven technology.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: T1 Energy is a Texas utility-scale solar developer benefiting from IRA tax credits and AI data center power demand, but lacks a technology moat in a highly competitive EPC market.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — project completions and PPA signings; revenue lumpiness watch
Long-term PPA with major data center operator — de-risks pipeline
IRA ITC retention — any rollback would materially impair project economics

advisory.bull_summary: Texas ERCOT power demand surge + IRA ITC + AI data center PPA demand creates real near-term project opportunity; Garcia founder CEO 4.2% alignment; 2.5 GW development pipeline.
advisory.bear_summary: No technology moat; EPC margins under compression from sector-wide competition; NextEra, Intersect Power, and dozens of regional developers compete for same projects; project-based revenue is lumpy and capital-intensive.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: ASP Isotopes sits at the intersection of nuclear renaissance (HALEU for SMRs), quantum computing (silicon-28), and medical isotopes — using a proprietary separation process that could make it the only non-governmental HALEU supplier in the West.

near_term_catalysts.description: South Africa pilot plant: first HALEU production from ASP process — technical de-risking milestone
DOE contract expansion: larger cooperative agreement for US domestic HALEU supply chain
Silicon-28 customer ramp: Intel or IBM production-scale order for quantum computing substrates

advisory.bull_summary: Russia HALEU ban created acute SMR fuel supply crisis — ASPI is the only commercial US HALEU pathway; silicon-28 demand from quantum computing is real and growing; Bartholomew + Terrien technical team credible; DOE cooperation agreement validates strategic value.
advisory.bear_summary: ASP process unproven at commercial scale; South Africa pilot still commissioning; NRC licensing for US facility years away; $8M revenue burning cash; centrifuge expansion or SILEX could commoditize before ASPI reaches scale.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: AST SpaceMobile is the only satellite constellation that connects directly to unmodified smartphones — if BlueBird scales, every MNO on Earth becomes a distribution partner and 3.5B unconnected people become potential subscribers.

near_term_catalysts.description: Block 2 manufacturing contract: financing and manufacturing agreement announcement — constellation buildout de-risking
Q2 2026 earnings — AT&T and Verizon commercial subscriber volume metrics; revenue ramp pace
Maritime/aviation enterprise vertical expansion beyond consumer MNO

advisory.bull_summary: Only D2D broadband to standard smartphones at commercial scale; MNO wholesale model means ASTS is infrastructure not consumer retail; Avellan 18.5% + super-voting = exceptional alignment; AT&T/Verizon/Vodafone partnerships validate technology.
advisory.bear_summary: Block 2 requires 100+ satellites at $10M+ each — severe dilution risk; SpaceX Starlink D2C (T-Mobile partnership) competes directly; pre-profitability at current scale; ITU spectrum disputes possible.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: The only vertically integrated launch provider with proven mission cadence outside SpaceX, compounding into a space systems business that serves as the DoD's indispensable second source.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — watch Space Systems revenue mix and Neutron development capex
Neutron reusable rocket development milestone announcements
Additional DoD/NRO mission manifest confirmation

advisory.bull_summary: Only non-SpaceX commercial launcher at proven mission cadence; DoD/NRO indispensable second source with deep mission trust; Space Systems components sold industry-wide as independent revenue stream; Neutron reusable rocket as next compounding growth vector.
advisory.bear_summary: FCF negative (FH 2/5); launch pricing compressed by SpaceX Falcon 9 cost floor; Neutron development capex creates dilution risk; launch market maturity timeline uncertain.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Freeport-McMoRan is the world's largest publicly traded copper producer with a structural supply deficit, new leaching technology unlocking 2B+ incremental lbs, and copper as the indispensable metal for EV, grid, and AI data center power.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — leaching technology production contribution and copper cost-per-lb trajectory
Leaching technology 2B+ lbs confirmation — production guidance upgrade catalyst
Copper price cycle: $5/lb+ copper → significant FCF and earnings expansion; watch Chinese stimulus

advisory.bull_summary: Only company with Grasberg + Morenci scale; copper supply deficit is structural (15-20 year greenfield lead time); leaching technology adds 2B+ lbs at minimal capex; Adkerson/Quirk deep institutional knowledge; AI data center copper demand underestimated.
advisory.bear_summary: Commodity pricing — FCX is a price-taker; global recession compresses copper demand and price; Indonesia Grasberg regulatory/community relations risk; Quirk new CEO with CFO background — operational execution risk.

tier_positions.tier: Rare Earth Separation & Critical Mineral Refining

fundamental.one_line_thesis: MP Materials is the only company in the US mining, processing, and manufacturing rare earth permanent magnets — a vertically integrated monopoly in an input that China controls globally and that every EV motor, wind turbine, and defense system depends on.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — Fort Worth magnet production volume vs. target; GM Ultium magnet ramp
China rare earth export controls escalation — accelerating MP's strategic value
DoD classified magnet contracts: expanding defense revenue contribution

advisory.bull_summary: Mountain Pass + Fort Worth = only US mine-to-magnet value chain; GM 20-year contract; China export controls are an ongoing demand accelerant; Litinsky 9.8% + Corbett co-founder = strong alignment; DoD strategic asset status prevents hostile foreign acquisition.
advisory.bear_summary: Stage III magnet manufacturing is first-of-kind in US — execution risk is real; REO prices volatile and can be suppressed by Chinese overproduction; Litinsky is a former hedge fund manager, not a mining operator; $3B market cap is already pricing significant Stage III success.

fundamental.one_line_thesis: Elmet is the only major US manufacturer of tungsten and molybdenum specialty products — a profitable, 80-year refractory metals franchise at the intersection of defense onshoring and semiconductor manufacturing, with China controlling 85% of global tungsten supply.

near_term_catalysts.description: Q2 2026 earnings — defense contract wins; semiconductor fab tungsten demand; China restrictions impact on pricing
Army/Marine Corps 120mm tungsten munitions procurement expansion
China tungsten export restriction escalation — strategic premium on Elmet products

advisory.bull_summary: 80+ year refractory metals expertise; DoD-qualified for critical defense applications (kinetic penetrators, aircraft components); semiconductor fab buildout (Intel Ohio, TSMC Arizona) increasing tungsten target demand; China 85% supply control creates acute strategic urgency for domestic alternatives.
advisory.bear_summary: Small scale ($190M revenue, $400M market cap); professional management without founder ownership drive; commodity tungsten pricing pressure from global suppliers; defense budget cuts could reduce munitions demand; post-SPAC governance still maturing.
